methods.signature: boolean findLine(String prefix, String[] sdp, Consumer consumer)
methods.full_signature: static boolean findLine(String prefix, String[] sdp, Consumer consumer)
methods.class_method_signature: SDP.findLine(String prefix, String[] sdp, Consumer consumer)

methods.full_signature: private static String findLine(String prefix, String[] sdp)
private static String[] findLines(String prefix, String[] sdp)

methods.signature: String[] getMediaLines(final String groupName, String[] sdp)
methods.full_signature: private static String[] getMediaLines(final String groupName, String[] sdp)

methods.parameters: (final CharSequence delimiter, final Iterable<? extends CharSequence> elements)

methods.class_method_signature: SDP.join(final CharSequence delimiter, final Iterable<? extends CharSequence> elements)

methods.parameters: (String[] items, int offset, BiConsumer<String, String> consumer)
methods.signature: void processParams(String[] items, int offset, BiConsumer<String, String> consumer)
methods.full_signature: private static void processParams(String[] items, int offset, BiConsumer<String, String> consumer)
methods.class_method_signature: SDP.processParams(String[] items, int offset, BiConsumer<String, String> consumer)

methods.parameters: (final String id, final String sid, final JingleElement jingleElement)

methods.full_signature: public String toSDP(final String id, final String sid, final JingleElement jingleElement)
methods.class_method_signature: SDP.toSDP(final String id, final String sid, final JingleElement jingleElement)

methods.signature: Payload createPayload(String payloadId, final String[] sdp)
methods.full_signature: private Payload createPayload(String payloadId, final String[] sdp)

methods.signature: String toSDP(Transport transport, final Candidate candidate)
methods.full_signature: private String toSDP(Transport transport, final Candidate candidate)

methods.parameters: (final String candidateName, Candidate candidate, String sdpName, ArrayList<String> sdp)
